titleStmt.title: SII 28.301: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 301. (A.R. No. 455 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This records a royal order addressed to Vilāḍarāyar and puravariyār instructing them to note that he had chosen to give up his entitlement to poṉvari, kāśāyam, kāttigai-ppachchai, nall-ērudu, naṟpaśu and such tax-incomes (āyam) in respect of 3000 kuḻi of land in two plots, called maṉavan-ēndal and ulakaṅkāttaperumāḷ-ēndal in Kīḻmagaṟūr granted to God Tāyilu-nalla-chōḷīśvaram-uḍaiyanāyaṉār of Āṟagaḷūr, by Kumaranadai Kayūr-ttēvaṉ. The land concerned was made tirunāmattu-kkāṇi-iṟai-ili (tax-free land held directly by the God/temple). The order was attested by the same two officials as in No. 300 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ḥ§ . vilāṭarāyarum puravariyārum ceyyakkaṭavapaṭi Āṟakaḷur Uṭaiyār tāyilu nalla coḷiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku kiḻmakaḷūr maṉavaṉentallum Ulakaṅkātta perumāḷentallum kumārantaikayūrt tevaṉ Innāyaṉāṟku Eḻāvatu
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kuṭutta naṉcey nilattuk kuḻi muvāyiramum tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiiliyāka poṉvari kācāyam kāttikaippaccai nallerutu naṟpacu Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyamu Iḻakka tirunāmattukāṇi Iṟaiiliyāka cantirātittavaṟ kuṭuttom
Ippaṭi kaṇakkil niṟuttik kuṭuppate § Ivai vāṇa kovaraiyaṉ ṉeḻuttu § Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 28.301 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
